text.title: AI Feature Brief Extension Pack Decision Tree

question.text: Can all four sections (model, eval, policy, cost) be answered with concrete values, not 'TBD'?

branch.conclusion: Publish extended brief; route to product+eng+finance review.
Block. Identify which section is unfilled; gather inputs first.
Escalate — write base PRD first; extension pack is additive, not foundational.

example.p: PRD exists → all four answerable (Sonnet 4, golden-summary-v1, refuse-if-conflict, $0.02/req) → conclusion: publish.
